Tumor Marker Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are tumor marker tests? 
These tests look for tumor markers, which are sometimes called cancer markers. Tumor markers are substances that are made by cancer cells or by normal cells in response to cancer . For example, some cancer cells make certain proteins in larger amounts than normal cells do. These proteins can act as tumor markers because their presence may mean canc
